ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the instrument */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was issued */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the instrument is listed */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument attribute */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., coupon rate, strike price) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_attributes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the risk metric (e.g., VaR, ES) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the metric (e.g., historical, parametric normal, parametric student, MC levy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the risk metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the risk metric */,
  "time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon for the risk metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the risk model used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for dividends and splits */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the scenario (e.g., economic indicators, market conditions) */,
  "creator" TEXT /* User who created the scenario */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market scenario */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the risk metric (e.g., VaR, ES) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the metric (e.g., historical, parametric normal, parametric student, MC levy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the risk metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the risk metric */,
  "time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon for the risk metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_results_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., risk analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., risk management, investment) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the compliance report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the report */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* User who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model parameter */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., confidence level, time horizon) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario parameter */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market scenario */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., economic indicator, market condition) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_parameters_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
